result:
### Odoo 19.3 Release Notes: New Features & Why Upgrade in 2026
What Is Odoo 19.3 and Why Does It Matter? Odoo 19.3, released in May 2026, is the latest version of Odoo ERP. It introduces AI agents that create and update records autonomously, offline-first mobile capabilities, a redesigned Manufacturing Kanban view, conversion-focused eCommerce features, and dozens of productivity improvements across more than 35 modules.
Source: https://www.aspiresoftserv.com/blog/odoo-19-3-release-notes-new-features-upgrade-guide

### Odoo 19.2 : les nouvelles fonctionnalités ERP à découvrir
Découvrez les nouveautés d'Odoo 19.2 : IA, CRM, SEO, comptabilité, eCommerce, fabrication, automatisations et nouvelles fonctionnalités ERP pour les PME.
Source: https://www.cs.studio/blog/odoo-13/odoo-19-2-35

### Odoo 19 features, roadmap & release date - what's new for businesses
When is the Odoo 19 release date Odoo 19 is expected to launch during Odoo Experience 2025, which will take place from September 18 to 20, 2025, at Brussels Expo. This timing (almost) aligns with Odoo's usual release pattern, where new versions are unveiled during the annual event and made publicly available shortly afterward.
Source: https://innowise.com/blog/what-to-expect-from-odoo-19/

### Odoo 19 Guide: Complete Module & Feature Overview 2026
Odoo 19 was officially released in September 2025, followed by incremental updates (19.1 in January 2026, 19.2 and 19.3 in May 2026), each adding further enhancements. The release is defined by three themes: AI-first workflows, 40% faster performance, and industry depth.
Source: https://www.mastersoftwaresolutions.com/odoo-19-guide-complete-module-overview/

### Opening Keynote - Unveiling Odoo 19 - YouTube
To kickstart this 3-day immersive experience, Odoo's Founder & CEO, Fabien Pinckaers, will give us a summary of everything that has been done over the past year for the release of this new version.
Source: https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=3nH7a6Y2qCs

Van websitecontent genereren tot slim recordbeheer en SEO-optimalisatie: stroomlijn je processen en ontdek efficiëntere werkwijzen met AI, die rechtstreeks geïntegreerd is in het platform.
